noSubtitles: Back to your local model peasant
But that's okay, because everything is running smoothly..right?

lastDecision.rationale: This reply discusses abuse-resistant system design and does not mention limits or a reset.

recentEvaluations.rationale: This reply discusses abuse-resistant system design and does not mention limits or a reset.
recentEvaluations.tweetText:
@SIGKITTEN @Mugilan_SS @OpenAI In a naive implementation, yes. But you can actually design the system in a way where abuse is hard.

It would have been easy to discard the right experience because of concerns for abuse.

recentEvaluations.rationale: This reply discusses product design around avoiding interruptions, not a current rate-limit reset.
recentEvaluations.tweetText:
@Mugilan_SS @OpenAI It’s the small things. When we designed this the tradeoff was between a good experience or optimize for margin and not allow to draw more usage than you technically have. 

We chose to optimize for the experience as it’s really annoying to have your agent interrupted midway.

recentEvaluations.rationale: The tweet explicitly says Codex rate limits were reset for all paid plans and usage is available again now.
recentEvaluations.tweetText:
Don't just reset Codex rate limits for fun, it costs money.
Don't just reset Codex rate limits for fun, it costs money.

... but the vibes are good ...

I have reset Codex rate limits for ALL paid plans to celebrate a good week and allow everyone to build more with GPT-5.5. Enjoy
